name: realtor-ai-brain
description: One shared AI Brain for a real estate agent — their identity (brand, market, avatars, voice, offer, visuals) and their memory (clients, listings, content history) — that every skill reads from and writes back to. Run Setup once; every tool already knows you. (The AI Admin is its own plugin on this same marketplace.) Now includes the system-wide Capture layer: the agent talks on the go (a video idea, a closing, a new vendor, a market note) and it files each into the right place — ideas, proof, vendors, intel — that every other system then reads.
